name: Green Bean Pasta Bake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions, then drain and set aside.
2. In a 10-inch skillet, cook onion, mushrooms, and seasoning until the onion is tender. Add tomatoes and tomato sauce; cook uncovered over medium-high heat for another 5 minutes. Remove from heat.
3. Stir in the pasta, green beans, and half of the shredded Monterey Jack cheese. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Mix well.
4. Pour into an 8 x 12 baking dish. Top with remaining cheese.
5. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes.
